How can I get more information?

Have removed the > /dev/null and got:

  |
2 | # SPDX-License-Identifier: GPL-2.0

make[1]: *** [rust/Makefile:171: rust/doctests_kernel_generated.rs] Error 1
make: *** [Makefile:2006: rust] Error 2
Do you have the branch somewhere so that I can take a look, please?

here is the branch: https://github.com/y86-dev/linux/tree/pinned-init

it has some commits I will need to rebase
hmm I am getting the same error on origin/rust....
if I use 542379556669fee413ad45bc9611187e075b0d47 then I do not get the error

ok I think I found the problem: mutex.rs:153
I am not allowed to use # Ok(()) in tests.

I do not know why this does not work, but it is probably because of the custom python script. can we make this work?: https://doc.rust-lang.org/rustdoc/write-documentation/documentation-tests.html#using--in-doc-tests
y86 has marked this topic as resolved.
